qualification_model.points_per_win: 4 pts (standard win) or 5 pts (win by big margin — bonus point)
qualification_model.note: Points system: a standard win = 4 pts; winning by a big margin earns a bonus point = 5 pts. Today's Troy Titans demolition (bowled out for 38, chased in 7 overs — bonus point win) lifts WW to 5th (34 pts) with a 5-point cushion over 8th place (JERSEY TIGERS, 29 pts). Five must-win fixtures remain against bottom-half teams. Winning all 5 with bonus points = +25 pts (total 59). Priority: don't just win the easy games — WIN BIG to stack bonus points and crush NRR. The three Swing/Upset games (Pway Cubs, Giant Slayers, NJ Marvels) are bonus opportunities — any win there is a gift.

briefing: Waterfront Warriors are 5th in Group C with 34 points from 10 games (7W/3L). Today's win over Troy Titans — bowled them out for 38 and chased in 7 overs — was a bonus-point performance that lifted NRR to +0.9523. The points system awards 4 pts for a win and 5 pts for a win by big margin (bonus point). With 10 games remaining — 5 must-wins, 3 swing games, 2 upsets — WW's playoff place is firmly in their own hands. Priority is winning the must-win games by big margins to stack bonus points and NRR. The real target is finishing top 4 for a favourable playoff draw.
